name: Cap Toe Oxford — Black
description: Hand-finished full-grain calf leather with a clean cap toe line. Built on a Goodyear welt for exceptional longevity and resolability. The definitive dress shoe.

name: Cap Toe Oxford — Tan
description: Rich tan full-grain leather cap toe oxford. Develops a beautiful patina with wear. Goodyear welted construction with a leather sole and rubber toe tap.

name: Cap Toe Oxford — Burgundy
description: Deep burgundy calf leather with a sharp cap toe seam. A wardrobe anchor that pairs equally well with charcoal suits and navy chinos.

name: Cap Toe Oxford — Grey Suede
description: Supple grey suede cap toe oxford for the man who dresses with intention. Light and breathable, finished with a leather sole and suede insole.

name: Cap Toe Derby — Burgundy
description: Open-lacing derby silhouette in deep burgundy calf leather. More relaxed than an oxford but equally refined. Goodyear welt, leather sole.

name: Cap Toe Derby — Cognac
description: Warm cognac calf leather derby with a clean cap toe. The open lacing makes this a versatile choice for business casual and formal occasions.

name: Plain Toe Derby — Black
description: Minimal, unadorned plain toe derby in polished black calf. The cleanest silhouette in formal footwear. Leather sole with a heel stack.

name: Plain Toe Derby — Brown
description: Medium brown calf leather plain toe derby. Understated, versatile, impeccably made. Pairs beautifully with brown and grey suits.

name: Plain Toe Oxford — Navy Suede
description: Navy suede plain toe oxford. A rare and sophisticated choice for the discerning dresser. Pairs brilliantly with grey flannel and khaki.

name: Plain Toe Oxford — Chocolate
description: Deep chocolate calf leather plain toe oxford with a rich, almost burnished finish. A distinguished alternative to standard brown.

name: Plain Toe Derby — Tan
description: Light tan calf leather plain toe derby. Fresh, clean, and endlessly versatile. An essential in any well-built wardrobe.

name: Wingtip Oxford — Black
description: Full wingtip broguing on a classic oxford last. The W-shaped toe cap adds character while maintaining formality. Goodyear welted black calf.

name: Wingtip Oxford — Cognac
description: Cognac calf leather wingtip oxford. The warm tone and rich broguing make this a standout piece for business and social events.

name: Wingtip Oxford — Brown
description: Classic brown calf leather wingtip with full W-cap broguing. Built for men who appreciate detail in their dressing.

name: Wingtip Derby — Tan
description: Tan calf wingtip derby combining the comfort of open lacing with decorative broguing. A relaxed take on a classic silhouette.

name: Saddle Oxford — White/Black
description: The iconic two-tone saddle oxford in crisp white and black. A statement piece rooted in Ivy League tradition. Hand-stitched saddle panel.

name: Saddle Derby — Brown/Tan
description: Brown and tan two-tone saddle derby. A refined take on the classic spectator shoe. Hand-stitched contrast saddle in tan calf.

name: Penny Loafer — Black
description: The essential black penny loafer. Full-grain calf leather upper with a classic strap and slot detail. A slip-on icon that never dates.

name: Penny Loafer — Tan
description: Tan calf leather penny loafer with a leather sole. Effortlessly smart with chinos, trousers, or a suit without socks.

name: Penny Loafer — Burgundy
description: Rich burgundy calf penny loafer. A refined, confident colour that works beautifully with grey, navy, and camel.

name: Penny Loafer — Cognac
description: Warm cognac calf leather penny loafer with a burnished toe. Polished enough for the office, relaxed enough for weekend dressing.

name: Tassel Loafer — Black
description: The definitive tassel loafer in gloss-polished black calf. Kiltie fringe, braided tassels, leather sole. A shoe with genuine personality.

name: Tassel Loafer — Brown
description: Medium brown calf tassel loafer. The braided tassels and kiltie fringe add a layer of elegance to an already refined silhouette.

name: Tassel Loafer — Burgundy
description: Burgundy calf tassel loafer with contrast kiltie fringe. A favourite among men who understand the power of colour in formal dressing.

name: Horsebit Loafer — Black
description: Black calf leather with a gold-tone horsebit hardware. The most recognisable loafer silhouette in luxury footwear. Immaculately constructed.

name: Horsebit Loafer — Tan
description: Tan calf leather horsebit loafer with polished gold hardware. Carry the spirit of the equestrian tradition in every step.

name: Horsebit Loafer — Cognac
description: Cognac calf leather with gold-tone horsebit. The warm tone makes this one of the most versatile pieces in the loafer family.

name: Driving Loafer — Brown
description: Hand-stitched brown nappa leather driving loafer with pebbled rubber sole. Designed for comfort and agility, perfect for long drives and city walks.

name: Driving Loafer — Navy
description: Navy nappa leather driving loafer with a hand-stitched pebbled sole. Wear sockless with chinos and a linen shirt for effortless warm-weather style.

name: Driving Loafer — Black
description: Sleek black nappa driving loafer. The minimalist design and pebbled sole make this equally at home in the office and at the weekend.

name: Full Brogue Oxford — Black
description: Full broguing on a closed-lace oxford last in polished black calf. Perforated medallion, wing cap, and edge broguing — craftsmanship you can see.

name: Full Brogue Oxford — Tan
description: Tan calf full brogue oxford. The most expressive shoe in the formal canon. Goodyear welted with a leather sole and heel stack.

name: Full Brogue Oxford — Burgundy
description: Deep burgundy full brogue oxford. Rich colour, meticulous perforations, and a profile built to command a room.

name: Full Brogue Derby — Brown
description: Brown calf full brogue in an open-lacing derby. Combines the decorative richness of broguing with the relaxed fit of a derby last.

name: Full Brogue Derby — Burgundy
description: Burgundy calf full brogue derby. The perforations perfectly complement the depth of the burgundy leather — a genuinely beautiful shoe.

name: Semi Brogue Oxford — Black
description: A cap toe oxford with a single row of perforations — the semi-brogue. Formal enough for a board meeting, interesting enough for dinner.

name: Semi Brogue Oxford — Brown
description: Medium brown calf semi-brogue oxford. The restrained broguing adds texture without compromising formality.

name: Semi Brogue Oxford — Tan
description: Tan calf semi-brogue oxford with a clean perforated cap line. Refined, versatile, and built to last for decades.

name: Semi Brogue Derby — Cognac
description: Cognac calf semi-brogue derby. The open lacing and warm colour tone make this an excellent choice for business casual dressing.

name: Longwing Brogue — Tan
description: The longwing brogue — where the wing cap extends all the way to the back seam. Tan calf, heavy broguing, a thoroughly American aesthetic.

name: Longwing Brogue — Black
description: Black calf longwing brogue with a continuous W-cap that wraps to the heel. Bold, structured, and unmistakably distinguished.

name: Longwing Brogue — Cognac
description: Cognac calf longwing brogue. The warmth of cognac leather combined with the boldness of longwing broguing — a statement piece for confident dressers.

name: Single Monk Strap — Black
description: Sleek black calf leather single monk with a polished gold buckle. The monk strap is the most expressive choice in formal footwear — wear it with confidence.

name: Single Monk Strap — Brown
description: Medium brown calf single monk strap with gold-tone hardware. An excellent alternative to lace-ups for business and formal occasions.

name: Single Monk Strap — Burgundy
description: Burgundy calf single monk strap. Deep colour, strong buckle, and a silhouette that draws attention for all the right reasons.

name: Single Monk Strap — Cognac
description: Cognac calf single monk with polished gold buckle. Warm, rich, and versatile — works with navy, grey, and camel equally well.

name: Single Monk Strap — Tan
description: Light tan calf single monk strap. A lighter tone that elevates summer suits and smart-casual dressing to a new level.

name: Double Monk Strap — Black
description: The double monk strap in polished black calf with dual gold-tone buckles. An unapologetically bold shoe for the man who dresses with purpose.

name: Double Monk Strap — Tan
description: Tan calf double monk strap with gold buckles. The architectural silhouette of two straps makes this a true conversation piece.

name: Double Monk Strap — Brown
description: Rich brown calf double monk. Two straps, two buckles, one very deliberate statement. Goodyear welted with a leather sole.

name: Double Monk Strap — Burgundy
description: Burgundy calf double monk strap. The richness of the colour paired with the boldness of double hardware makes this genuinely striking.

name: Double Monk Strap — Cognac
description: Cognac calf double monk with brushed gold buckles. A warm, luxurious combination that pairs extraordinarily well with earth-tone suits.

name: Chelsea Boot — Black
description: The original Chelsea boot in polished black calf leather. Elastic side panels, pull-back tab, leather sole. Timeless British construction.

name: Chelsea Boot — Tan
description: Tan calf leather Chelsea boot. Clean elastic goring, leather pull tab, and a stacked leather heel. A wardrobe essential for every season.

name: Chelsea Boot — Dark Brown
description: Dark brown calf Chelsea boot with elastic side panels and leather sole. Rich colour that deepens beautifully with polishing and wear.

name: Chelsea Boot — Burgundy
description: Burgundy calf Chelsea boot. The pull-on silhouette in a bold colour — dress it up with trousers or down with dark denim.

name: Chelsea Boot — Cognac
description: Cognac calf Chelsea boot with a warm burnished finish. An incredibly versatile boot that crosses the smart-casual divide effortlessly.

name: Chukka Boot — Tan
description: The desert boot reimagined. Tan suede upper, two-eyelet lacing, crepe rubber sole. Effortlessly cool and endlessly wearable.

name: Chukka Boot — Black
description: Black calf leather chukka boot. More refined than the suede variant, the leather chukka bridges formal and casual with ease.

name: Chukka Boot — Brown
description: Brown calf chukka boot with two-eyelet lacing and a leather sole. The perfect all-season boot for smart-casual dressing.

name: Chukka Boot — Navy Suede
description: Navy suede chukka boot — a rare and sophisticated colour choice. Wear with grey trousers and a white shirt for a clean, confident look.

name: Chukka Boot — Cognac
description: Warm cognac leather chukka boot with a classic ankle profile and leather sole. Adds warmth and character to any outfit.

name: Derby Boot — Black
description: Black calf derby boot with open-lacing and a toe cap. Combines the formal credentials of a dress shoe with the ankle coverage of a boot.

name: Derby Boot — Brown
description: Brown calf derby boot with cap toe and Goodyear welt construction. A serious boot for serious dressers.

name: Derby Boot — Tan
description: Tan calf derby boot — lighter in colour but no less refined. Open-lace construction with a stacked leather heel.

name: Derby Boot — Burgundy
description: Burgundy calf derby boot with a plain toe cap. The depth of colour makes this a particularly compelling choice for autumn and winter dressing.

name: Jodhpur Boot — Black
description: Black calf jodhpur boot with a single ankle strap and brass buckle. Rooted in equestrian tradition, refined for modern dress.

name: Jodhpur Boot — Tan
description: Tan calf jodhpur boot with side buckle strap. The laceless construction and ankle strap give this boot a very clean, commanding silhouette.

name: Jodhpur Boot — Brown
description: Brown calf jodhpur boot. The single strap and clean profile make this one of the most distinctive silhouettes in men's footwear.

name: Jodhpur Boot — Cognac
description: Cognac calf jodhpur boot with burnished toe and ankle strap. Opulent, structured, and unmistakably high-end.

name: Leather Low Top — White
description: Clean white full-grain leather low-top sneaker with a minimalist profile. A pristine foundation for any outfit from casual to smart-casual.

name: Leather Low Top — Black
description: Black full-grain leather low-top sneaker. The sleekest sneaker silhouette — pairs with everything from suits to joggers.

name: Leather Low Top — Tan
description: Tan leather low-top sneaker with a white cupsole. A warm, casual option that bridges the gap between trainer and dress shoe.

name: Leather Low Top — Navy
description: Navy leather low-top sneaker with a white vulcanised sole. A sophisticated casual option with strong Ivy League energy.

name: Leather Low Top — Grey
description: Grey leather low-top with a clean white sole. Understated and versatile — the sneaker equivalent of grey flannel trousers.

name: Leather Low Top — Cognac
description: Cognac leather low-top sneaker. Warm tones and a premium leather upper make this the most dressed-up sneaker in the collection.

name: Leather Low Top — Burgundy
description: Burgundy leather low-top sneaker with white sole. A bold colour in a clean silhouette — for men who like their casual shoes to make a statement.

name: Leather High Top — White
description: White full-grain leather high-top sneaker. The ankle collar adds structure and a distinctive silhouette. A modern classic for relaxed luxury.

name: Leather High Top — Black
description: Black leather high-top with a padded ankle collar and sturdy lacing. Edgy, deliberate, and built with the same care as our dress shoes.

name: Leather High Top — Tan
description: Tan leather high-top with an ankle collar and white sole. A warm, approachable option for effortless weekend dressing.

name: Leather High Top — Grey
description: Grey leather high-top sneaker. The muted tone and high ankle profile create a refined streetwear aesthetic.

name: Leather High Top — Navy
description: Navy leather high-top with padded collar and white vulcanised sole. Strong nautical inspiration, modern execution.

name: Court Trainer — White/Grey
description: White leather court trainer with grey accent panelling. Inspired by the tennis court. Clean, proportionate, and built to be worn hard.

name: Court Trainer — Black
description: All-black leather court trainer with a cupsole. Minimal, sharp, and versatile — the sneaker for men who don't do loud.

name: Court Trainer — White
description: All-white leather court trainer. The cleanest and most versatile sneaker in the collection. A foundational piece for any casual wardrobe.

name: Court Trainer — Tan
description: Tan leather court trainer with a white cupsole. A warm-toned casual option that pairs beautifully with earth tones.

name: Court Trainer — Navy
description: Navy leather court trainer with a white cupsole and navy laces. A sophisticated take on the casual trainer — wears effortlessly.

name: Leather Slide — Black
description: Single-strap black leather slide with a padded insole and rubber sole. The most refined way to go sockless. Pool to street.

name: Leather Slide — Tan
description: Tan vegetable-tanned leather slide. Wide single strap, padded footbed, natural rubber sole. Light, breathable, impeccably made.

name: Leather Slide — Brown
description: Brown leather single-strap slide with cushioned insole. Warm colour, cool energy. The slide reimagined for the discerning man.

name: Leather Slide — Cognac
description: Cognac leather slide with a wide strap and padded footbed. The warm tone makes this an ideal warm-weather companion.

name: Strappy Sandal — Tan
description: Tan vegetable-tanned leather strappy sandal with three adjustable straps and a leather-wrapped buckle. Handcrafted construction.

name: Strappy Sandal — Black
description: Black leather strappy sandal with adjustable buckle straps and a contoured cork footbed. Minimal, refined, and endlessly comfortable.

name: Leather Espadrille — Navy
description: Navy canvas and leather espadrille with a braided jute sole. The quintessential warm-weather shoe — light, breathable, and effortlessly stylish.

name: Leather Espadrille — Tan
description: Tan leather espadrille with jute rope sole. Lightweight and perfect for warm-weather occasions from rooftop parties to seaside strolls.

name: Leather Espadrille — Black
description: Black leather espadrille with braided jute sole. A sleek casual option that pairs well with linen trousers and shorts.

name: Hand-Stitched Moccasin — Brown
description: Hand-stitched brown nappa leather moccasin. Soft, supple, and luxuriously comfortable from the first wear. Leather sole with suede insole.

name: Hand-Stitched Moccasin — Tan
description: Tan nappa leather hand-stitched moccasin. The hand-sewn apron toe and wrap-around construction are the hallmarks of traditional craft.

name: Hand-Stitched Moccasin — Black
description: Black nappa leather moccasin. Sleek and minimal — the most formal interpretation of the moccasin silhouette.
